abstract.text: An object representing parameters used to create a PaymentMethod object.

inlineContent.text: To create a PaymentMethod from an Apple Pay PKPaymentToken, see

abstract.text: Set of key-value pairs that you can attach to the PaymentMethod. This can be useful for storing additional information about the PaymentMethod in a structured format.
